theme.archetype: Luxury (Premium, Depth, Mystery) & Performance Pro Hybrid
theme.vibe: Cinematic, luxury automotive style, sleek, high-contrast, focused

surfaces_and_glassmorphism.login_panel: backdrop-blur-3xl bg-[#1A1A1A]/40 border border-white/10 shadow-[0_15px_50px_rgba(0,0,0,0.6)] rounded-2xl p-8
surfaces_and_glassmorphism.dashboard_card: bg-[#141414] border border-white/5 shadow-lg rounded-xl overflow-hidden
surfaces_and_glassmorphism.task_item: group flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-transparent hover:bg-white/[0.02] border-b border-white/5 transition-colors cursor-pointer
surfaces_and_glassmorphism.share_modal: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#0B0B0B]/90 border border-white/10 shadow-2xl rounded-2xl

buttons_and_interactions.primary: bg-[#DC143C] text-white font-semibold py-3 px-6 rounded-lg transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-[#ED1C45] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(220,20,60,0.4)]
buttons_and_interactions.secondary: bg-transparent text-white border border-white/20 font-semibold py-3 px-6 rounded-lg transition-all hover:border-white/40 hover:bg-white/5
buttons_and_interactions.input: w-full bg-[#1A1A1A]/50 border border-white/10 rounded-lg p-3 text-white placeholder-[#555555] focus:border-[#DC143C] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#DC143C] outline-none transition-all

task_complete.description: Animate a line-through pseudo-element from width 0% to 100%, alongside text color shifting to #555555. Use GSAP or CSS transitions on an absolutely positioned span acting as the strike-through line.

hover_magnetic.description: For main CTA buttons, use a subtle magnetic GSAP effect tracking the mouse (x/y +/- 5px) combined with a CSS box-shadow glow.

layout_and_spacing.auth_page: min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-[#0B0B0B] relative overflow-hidden
layout_and_spacing.sidebar: w-72 border-r border-white/5 bg-[#121212] flex flex-col h-full
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous padding: p-6, p-8, gap-6, gap-8 to maintain an open, luxury automotive dashboard feel.

components_strategy.auth_tabs: Use Shadcn Tabs. Remove default backgrounds. Use an active indicator (a crimson bottom border or pill background) with sliding animation.
components_strategy.share_modal: Use Shadcn Dialog. Include 3 permission badges (View, Edit, Full Access) styled distinctively.
components_strategy.loading_spinner: Custom minimal SVG spinner with GSAP rotation and stroke-dasharray animation in crimson.
components_strategy.dropdowns: Shadcn DropdownMenu with dark glassmorphism styling (`backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#1A1A1A]/80 border border-white/10`).

images.description: Auth background acts as a subtle dark abstract/crimson texture under a deep black gradient overlay. Empty state image is an automotive-inspired abstract to keep the dashboard feeling premium when no tasks exist.

media_and_assets.icons: lucide-react (using lightweight, crisp strokes. Match stroke width across all icons, preferably strokeWidth={1.5})

testing_requirements.data_testid: ALL interactive elements, form inputs, modals, auth tabs, task items, and actionable buttons MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='login-submit-button'`, `data-testid='add-task-input'`). Use kebab-case.

firebase_integration_notes.auth: Support Email/Password + Phone OTP. Phone OTP requires ReCAPTCHA integration.
firebase_integration_notes.firestore: Collections for `users`, `lists`, and `tasks`. Sharing requires permission fields (read, edit, full) mapped to user emails or UIDs.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load GSAP and use the `useGSAP` hook or standard `gsap.context` in React to safely animate elements on mount.
Import custom fonts (Cabinet Grotesk and Manrope) using standard CDN or local assets.
Build the dashboard layout focusing on empty space and high-contrast typography, avoiding unnecessary borders.
Ensure Firebase config is modular. Mock API endpoints ONLY IF Firebase credentials are entirely absent.
Make sure the 'Share List' UI reacts gracefully based on the selected permission tier.
Implement the task completion strike-through as a cinematic GSAP trace animation, not just a static text-decoration.
